items.title: Solstice (SOLS) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
items.description: David Sewell: Thank you, Michael Leithead.  During the fourth quarter, Solstice Advanced Materials Inc. continued to deliver strong financial and operational results as we transitioned to an independent public company following the completion of our spin-off from Honeywell on October 30.  Across the business, we are seeing increasing momentum driven by secular growth trends in areas such as nuclear energy, AI, and data centers that are well aligned with our differentiated technology platforms.
